name: API Proxy
description: Configure and monitor the OpenAI-compatible local proxy. Set port, API key, and host allowlist. Actual proxy server requires core IPC support.
author: contex

actions.name: configure
actions.description: Update proxy config. Params: { port?: number, apiKey?: string, enabled?: boolean }

actions.name: getUrl
actions.description: Returns the proxy base URL as { url: string }
